title: Hot Pink Glitter Ribbon, 2.5 Inch 10 Yards Sparkly Wired Edge Fabric Ribbon for Craft, Wreath Bow, Gift Wrapping, Christmas Party Decoration
features: 【About Size】The Package Comes With - 1 roll of glitter ribbon, each roll measures 10 yards in length, and 2.5 inch in width, long enough to meet your different needs for DIY crafts and sewing.
【Quality Material】The glitter ribbon is made of premium burlap, which is odorless, non-shrink and colorfast, can be stored and used for a long time.

【Multiple Color】Different colors are offered to you: silver, red, purple, gold, hot pink, green, lake blue, royal blue, light pink, champagne and etc. You can pick the color you need. The colors are exactly as the picture showed, lively and bright, enhancing the attractiveness of your gift packaging and adding a special festive atmosphere.

【Wide Usage】Our glitter ribbons can be ideal for a variety of DIY projects, including headbands, bows, gift wrap, baskets, wreaths and other decorations. Perfect for Christmas, anniversaries, birthdays, Wedding and other occasions.

【Guarantee】If you are not satisfied for any reason, just return for a refund of your purchase price; we promise 24 hours customer support, please feel free to contact us for any product&order problem.
description: RIBBOOO glitter wired edge ribbon, with multiple color options, it's an ideal choice for crafts making, such as wreath bow decoration, gift wrapping, making your gift more standing out. Features: Ribbons are made from high-quality burlap material. The surface is smooth without wrinkles, you don't need to iron before using it. [Specification] Material: Burlap Size: 10 yards (9.14 meters), width: 2.5 inch. Color: silver, red, purple, gold, wine red, green, lake blue, royal blue, light pink, champagne and etc. Packaging includes: 1 roll per pack Notes: 1. Please allow for slight dimensional errors due to manual measurement. 2. The winding risk may exist, please keep away from children. 3. Please allow slight color differences due to different monitors.
